items.title: American Express (AXP) Rises As Market Takes a Dip: Key Facts
items.description: American Express (AXP) closed the most recent trading day at $336, moving +2.74% from the previous trading session.

items.title: American Express Plans Live Audio Webcast of Third-Quarter 2025 Earnings Conference Call
items.description: NEW YORK, September 17, 2025--American Express Company (NYSE: AXP) plans to host a live audio webcast of its earnings conference call at 8:30 a.m. (ET) on Friday, October 17, 2025, to discuss the company’s third-quarter 2025 financial results.
